messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'imagesMap'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. You can also do a functional update 'setImagesMap(i => ...)' if you only need 'imagesMap' in the 'setImagesMap' call.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [imagesMap]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'drawFrame' and 'frameIndex'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [drawFrame, frameIndex]
